panels.title: Request rate
panels.description: Chat-completions dispatched to workers per second.

panels.title: Healthy workers
panels.description: Workers whose circuit breaker currently admits requests.

panels.title: Request rate by worker
panels.description: Per-worker dispatch rate — reveals routing imbalance.

panels.title: TTFT quantiles (streaming)
panels.description: Time to first token (first upstream chunk) for streaming requests.

panels.title: ITL quantiles (streaming)
panels.description: Inter-token latency (gap between successive upstream chunks) for 2xx streaming requests. Bucket edges match the engine's sglang:inter_token_latency_seconds for direct quantile comparison.

panels.title: Stream outcomes (end-of-stream truth)
panels.description: End-of-stream classification for 2xx streaming responses: ok / inband_error / upstream_error / client_disconnect. inband_error is an engine that committed 200 OK then failed in-band — invisible to every headers-time metric.

panels.title: In-flight requests per worker
panels.description: Requests currently dispatched to each worker.

panels.title: Active load — prefill tokens
panels.description: Per-worker prefill-token load tracked by the active-load policy.

panels.title: Active load — decode blocks
panels.description: Per-worker decode-block load tracked by the active-load policy.

panels.title: Overlap blocks quantiles
panels.description: Cache-aware-zmq overlap-block count at policy selection.

panels.title: Stale-request cancellations
panels.description: Stale-request cancellations fired by the janitor.
